title: Shapes of organic molecules; σ and π bonds
summary: 9701 AS — bond angles, hybridisation, and σ/π bonding in organic structures.
learningObjectives: Explain restricted rotation around double bonds.

simpleExplanation.title: 3D organic geometry
simpleExplanation.summary: Carbon bonding determines molecular shape. Single bonds allow rotation; double bonds lock geometry.
steps: π bond side-on overlap between p orbitals.

sections.content: **Organic shapes** (13.3) links **3.5 molecular shapes** to **13.4 isomerism**. Draw **3D wedge bonds** where helpful.
